text:
1/ We had an agent loop silently dropping tasks for 5 days. Not crashing — skipping. Here's what we learned.

2/ The model was fine. The state machine was broken. Partial deltas ate our state. Lesson: append-only patches only.

3/ Budget check has to be *after* charge, not before. Otherwise every run overshoots by one call. 40-line fix, 5-day hunt.

4/ Retries without attribution multiply invisibly. Tag every retry with a reason code. If you can't ask 'why are we retrying?', you're flying blind.

5/ The whole fix was 40 lines. Finding it was the job. Observability is the whole game — budget every loop, log every delta, name every retry.
